overview: Newton's Institute of Engineering (NIE), located near Macherla in the Guntur district of Andhra Pradesh, is a prominent self-financed engineering institution established in 2001 by Lincoln's Educational Society. Situated across a sprawling 25.32-acre campus near the historic Nagarjuna Sagar Dam, the college is temporarily affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada. It focuses on providing career-oriented technical and management education to rural and semi-urban student groups.
accreditation: Approved by AICTE; Accredited by NAAC with a Grade 'B++'.

placements.placementRate: CSE & IT Streams: 73.5%, ECE Stream: 68%, EEE/Core Branches: 55% – 60%
placements.totalOffers: 300+ total job selections across multi-company pool drives
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, Cognizant, IBM
placements.internshipHighlights: Industry academic-linked project internships with standard technical role selections

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions strictly line up with standard Andhra Pradesh state counseling procedures (APSCHE) governed by engineering or post-graduate state entry rank lists.
admissions.importantDates: Schedules run in accordance with AP EAPCET, AP ICET, and Convener seat allocation timelines.

campus.specialNote: The engineering campus is located 15 kilometers away from the Nagarjuna Sagar Dam, providing a natural scenic background.

hostelFees.StandardSharingRoom: ₹45,000 – ₹55,000 per year inclusive of basic mess infrastructure services

contact.address: Algurajupally, Koppunur, Macherla, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh – 522426, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Fee consideration extensions offered to top institutional scorers.
scholarships.fullWaiver: 100% tuition coverage for highly-ranked candidates matching dynamic state metrics.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Institutional concessions provided to students from economically backward sectors.
scholarships.governmentAid: Full post-matric fee reimbursements available to eligible SC, ST, OBC, and Kapu category students via the Andhra Pradesh Jagananna Amma Vodi and Vidya Deevena programs.
